title: Exclusive: Trump eyes Cuba economic deal after Venezuela strike
shortDescription: The Trump administration is preparing a possible economic deal with Cuba, sources with knowledge of the administration’s plans said.

title: Cuba 'at the end of the line,' Trump warns at summit with Latin America
shortDescription: President Donald Trump once again warned of change coming to Cuba, adding that negotiations are occurring between the island nation and the U.S.

title: Trump says he'll 'take care of Cuba'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump on told a gathering of Latin American leaders that he would “take care of Cuba,” as he touted recent U.S. military operations in Venezuela and Iran.

title: Trump says Iran bombed school amid investigation
shortDescription: Although a U.S. investigation is underway, President Trump is blaming Iran for the Feb. 28 bombing of an Iranian school that killed 175 people.

title: Trump says ending Iran war will be 'mutual' decision with Netanyahu
shortDescription: President Trump's comments come as Iran appointed Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as the country's new supreme leader.

title: Trump: Iran bombed girls' school. 'They have no accuracy whatsoever'
shortDescription: Speaking aboard Air Force One on March 7, Trump blamed Iran for the bombing of Shajareh Tayyebeh elementary school in Minab.

title: January 6 plaque installed in US Capitol after years of delays
shortDescription: House Republicans − in control since 2023 − delayed its installation after the law required it to be installed by March 2023.

title: Noem makes her first appearance since DHS firing at Trump summit
shortDescription: Former Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem is making her debut as special envoy for the "Shield of the Americas" — a position Trump shuttled her into after reshuffling DHS.

title: Trump says US ‘did the world a favor’ on Iran
shortDescription: President Trump said that the war with Iran "had to be done" during a speech in front of Latin American leaders in Florida.

title: See Trump host Latin America leaders for the 'Shield of the Americas'
shortDescription: The 'Shield of the Americas,' President Trump's initiative for security against narcotics trafficking, brought Latin America leaders to Florida.

title: Iran war: Trump rebuffs UK aircraft carrier: 'We don't need them'
shortDescription: Israel expanded its military operation against Hezbollah in Lebanon, unleashing airstrikes that killed scores.

title: Trump receives remains of six Americans killed in Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump attended the dignified transfer of six Americans killed in a drone attack on a Kuwait base during fighting with Iran.

title: Trump may need billions for the Iran war. Congress stands in the way.
shortDescription: Capitol Hill is largely in the dark about what an emergency cash influx for the Iran war could look like. But Trump will have to go through Democrats.

title: Why are we at war with Iran? Trump has given many different reasons
shortDescription: President Donald Trump announced the attacks on Iran a week ago, and since then the objective list is growing. Why is the US at war with Iran?

title: Trump launched a ‘war on fraud.’ Here's why it’s a 50‑state problem
shortDescription: President Trump declared a 'war on fraud,' but experts say it's a battle that has eluded presidents for decades.

title: Cubastroika: Inside Trump's plan to win Cuba with American oil
shortDescription: Rather than force regime change, President Trump and Marco Rubio aim to win control of the island by deepening its economic dependence on the US.

title: Many Americans oppose Trump, U.S. military actions in Iran, new poll says
shortDescription: A majority of Americans oppose U.S. military actions in Iran and disapprove of Trump's handling of the conflict, a new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll shows.

title: Pregnant ER patients took less Tylenol after Trump's autism claims: study
shortDescription: After a September 2025 press conference in which President Trump told pregnant women not to use Tylenol, usage dropped in ERs, a new study found.

title: New Epstein files include Trump accusations
shortDescription: The DOJ released missing FBI interviews on the Jeffrey Epstein case that include accusations against President Donald Trump.
